query: What are the major phases, decision points and associated fees, if any, in the NYISO generation interconnection cluster study process?
final_answer:
## NYISO Generation Interconnection Cluster Study Process

The NYISO's **Standard Interconnection Procedures** (effective May 2, 2024 under OATT Attachment HH) replaced the prior sequential Feasibility/System Impact/Class Year studies with a streamlined two-phase **Cluster Study Process**. Below are the major phases, decision points, and associated fees.

---

### Phase 0: Pre-Application & Application Window

**Pre-Application**: Customers may review the **Heatmap** (publicly posted interactive map of estimated injection capacity) and request a **Pre-Application Report** for preliminary information. *(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.4; NYISO SIP FAQ)*

**Application Window**: The cluster study cycle begins when NYISO opens an Application Window.

| Standard Cluster | Transition Cluster (first cycle) |
|---|---|
| 45 calendar days | 75 calendar days |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.5.1; Technical Bulletin 262)*

**Required Submissions & Fees at Entry:**

| Fee Type | Amount | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Non-refundable Application Fee** | **$10,000** (Interconnection Request) / **$5,000** (CRIS-Only Request) | Cash only |
| **Study Deposit (SD)** — by project size: | | Cash, Letter of Credit, or surety bond |
| < 80 MW | **$100,000** | |
| ≥ 80 MW < 200 MW | **$150,000** | |
| ≥ 200 MW | **$250,000** | |
| CRIS-Only projects | **$50,000** | |
| Small Generating Facilities | **$100,000** | |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.5.5; NYISO Notice of Transition Cluster Study Application Window, July 1, 2024; Cluster Study Overview Figure, Dec. 14, 2023 OC Mtg)*

Other required materials: conceptual one-line diagram, project layout, workable models, site control demonstration, and (for IBRs >20 MW) NYSRC Rule B.5 attestation. NYISO validates within **5 business days** (10 for Transition); deficiencies must be cured within **10 business days** (15 for Transition). *(Source: Tech Bulletin 262; OATT Attach. HH § 40.5.7)*

---

### Phase 1: Customer Engagement Window

| Standard Cluster | Transition Cluster |
|---|---|
| 70 calendar days | 90 calendar days |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.7.1; Tech Bulletin 262)*

**Activities:**
1. **NYISO publishes cluster member list** within 10 business days of close of Application Window
2. **Physical Infeasibility Screening** — connecting Transmission Owner assesses whether proposed interconnections are physically feasible
3. **Group Scoping Meeting** for the cluster

**Decision Point 1 → Phase 1 Entry Decision Period (5 business days)**

The customer must either:
- **Proceed to Phase 1** — post **Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)** = **$4,000/MW** (not applicable to CRIS-only projects)
- **Withdraw** — may be subject to **Withdrawal Penalty 1 (WP1)**

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.7.5; Cluster Study Overview Figure)*

**WP1 = 25% of Study Deposit**, except:
- $0 if project withdraws within 5 business days of posting of cluster member list
- $5,000 if interconnection is physically infeasible

---

### Phase 2: Phase 1 Study (Local Facilities & Upgrades)

| Standard Cluster | Transition Cluster |
|---|---|
| **180 calendar days** | **190 calendar days** |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.9.2.1; Tech Bulletin 262)*

**What happens:**
- Transmission Owners identify and cost-estimate the **Connecting Transmission Owner's Attachment Facilities (CTOAFs)**, **Local System Upgrade Facilities (Local SUFs)**, and **Distribution Upgrades** required for each project
- Pre-work for Phase 2 MIS/DIS analyses is conducted
- Concludes with **Operating Committee approval of the Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report**

**Decision Point 2 → Phase 2 Entry Decision Period (10 business days)**

The customer must either:
- **Proceed to Phase 2** — post **Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)** = the greater of **(i) RD1** ($4,000/MW) and **(ii) 20% of the Phase 1 cost estimate** for Local SUF and CTOAF
- **Withdraw** — subject to **Withdrawal Penalty 2 (WP2)**

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.10.8; Cluster Study Overview Figure)*

**WP2 = 50% of Study Deposit + 10% of RD1**, except if interconnection is physically infeasible, then only **25% of Study Deposit**.

---

### Phase 3: Phase 2 Study (System Upgrades & Deliverability)

| Standard & Transition Clusters |
|---|
| **270 calendar days** |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.9.2.1; Tech Bulletin 262)*

**What happens:**
- ISO develops **Cluster Baseline Assessment (CBA)** and **Cluster Project Assessment (CPA)** base cases
- ISO identifies **System Upgrade Facilities (SUFs)** and **System Deliverability Upgrades (SDUs)** required for reliable interconnection and deliverability
- For projects requesting **CRIS**, ISO conducts the **Cluster Study Deliverability Study** (per NYISO Deliverability Interconnection Standard, OATT Attach. HH § 40.13)
- Cost estimates and preliminary construction schedules are produced
- Concludes with **Operating Committee approval of the Cluster Study Report**

**If applicable**, an **Additional SDU Study** may be performed (OATT Attach. HH § 40.14).

---

### Phase 4: Final Decision Period (Iterative)

**Format:** Multiple iterative decision rounds; no fixed duration (process continues until all projects decide)

Each customer must either:
- **Accept its Project Cost Allocation** and **pay cash or post Security** equal to **100% of the cost estimate of SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs** identified in Phases 1 and 2
- **Reject / Withdraw** — subject to **Withdrawal Penalty 3 (WP3)**

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.15; Cluster Study Overview Figure)*

**WP3 = 100% of Study Deposit + 20% of RD2**, except:
- If interconnection physically infeasible: only **50% of Study Deposit**
- If there is an increase of greater than **50% of total cost estimate** between Phase 1 and Phase 2 (excluding SDU costs): only **100% of Study Deposit**

---

### Phase 5: Post-Study — Agreement Negotiation

Customers that accept cost allocation and post security proceed to **negotiate a Standard Interconnection Agreement** and any required construction agreements. *(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.21)*

**Security Forfeiture:** Up to **100% of Security** is subject to forfeiture if the project later withdraws and other projects were relying on the upgrades identified for its project. *(Source: Cluster Study Overview Figure)*

---

### Summary of All Fees & Penalties

| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| **Application Fee** | $10,000 (IR) / $5,000 (CRIS-only) — non-refundable |
| **Study Deposit (SD)** | $100K (<80 MW), $150K (80–200 MW), $250K (≥200 MW), $50K (CRIS-only) |
| **RD1 (Phase 1 Entry)** | $4,000/MW |
| **RD2 (Phase 2 Entry)** | Greater of (i) RD1 or (ii) 20% of Phase 1 cost estimate (Local SUF + CTOAF) |
| **Security (Final Decision)** | 100% of SUF + SDU + CTOAF cost estimates |
| **WP1 (withdraw at DP1)** | 25% of SD (or $0/$5K exceptions) |
| **WP2 (withdraw at DP2)** | 50% of SD + 10% of RD1 |
| **WP3 (withdraw at Final DP)** | 100% of SD + 20% of RD2 |

*Note: Withdrawal penalty funds are first used to offset study costs of remaining projects; excess amounts offset Rate Schedule 1 costs. (Source: NYISO Order No. 2023 Compliance Plan, Nov. 2, 2023)*

---

### Overall Timeline

| Phase | Standard Cluster | Transition Cluster |
|---|---|---|
| Application Window | 45 days | 75 days |
| Customer Engagement Window | 70 days | 90 days |
| Phase 1 Study | 180 days | 190 days |
| Phase 2 Study | 270 days | 270 days |
| Final Decision Period | Iterative | Iterative |
| **Total (approx.)** | **~569 days (1.6 yrs)** | **~629 days (1.7 yrs)** |

*(Source: OATT Attach. HH § 40.9.2; Tech Bulletin 262)*

steps.reasoning: The user is asking about the NYISO (New York Independent System Operator) generation interconnection cluster study process, including major phases, decision points, and associated fees. Let me search for this information.

NYISO validates within **5 business days** (10 for Transition); deficiencies must be cured within **10 business days** (15 for Transition). *(Source: Tech Bulletin 262; OATT Attach. HH § 40.5.7)*

### Phase 1: Customer Engagement Window

|---|---|

| Standard & Transition Clusters |
|---|
| **270 calendar days** |

| Item | Amount |
|---|---|

| Phase | Standard Cluster | Transition Cluster |
